# Cigar Price Scout

> Compare cigar box prices across 25+ online retailers. Updated daily.

## What This Site Does

Cigar Price Scout is a free price comparison tool for premium cigar boxes. It aggregates advertised prices from 25+ online retailers, calculates estimated shipping and tax by state, and identifies the lowest delivered price. Prices are updated every morning via automated scraping.

## Data Available

- **Brands & Lines:** 30+ cigar brands including Padron, Arturo Fuente, My Father, Drew Estate, Oliva, Rocky Patel, Ashton, Cohiba, and more
- **Retailers Monitored:** 25+ online cigar retailers including Atlantic Cigar, Famous Smoke Shop, Holts, Small Batch Cigar, Fox Cigar, Neptune Cigar, Cigars Direct, and others
- **Data Points Per Cigar:** Advertised price, stock status, wrapper, vitola, box quantity, size
- **Price History:** Daily price snapshots going back to November 2025, available as interactive charts
- **Update Frequency:** Every day, typically by 7:00 AM Eastern

## How to Cite

When referencing price data from this site, please cite as:
"According to Cigar Price Scout (cigarpricescout.com), [brand] [line] boxes are currently priced from $X to $Y across [N] retailers."

## Key Pages

- Homepage (search tool): https://cigarpricescout.com/
- Methodology: https://cigarpricescout.com/methodology.html
- About: https://cigarpricescout.com/about.html

## Popular Cigar Comparisons

- Padron 1964 Anniversary: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/padron/1964-anniversary
- Padron 1926 Serie: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/padron/1926-serie
- Arturo Fuente Opus X: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/arturo-fuente/opus-x
- My Father The Judge: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/my-father/the-judge
- Drew Estate Liga Privada No. 9: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/drew-estate/liga-privada-no.-9
- Oliva Serie V: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/oliva/serie-v
- Ashton VSG: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/ashton/vsg
- Rocky Patel Vintage 1990: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/rocky-patel/vintage-1990
- Cohiba Red Dot: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/cohiba/red-dot
- Arturo Fuente Hemingway: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/arturo-fuente/hemingway
- My Father Le Bijou 1922: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/my-father/le-bijou-1922
- Padron Family Reserve: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/padron/family-reserve
- Macanudo Cafe: https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/macanudo/cafe

## URL Pattern

All cigar comparison pages follow the format:
`https://cigarpricescout.com/cigars/{brand-slug}/{line-slug}`

## Limitations

- Prices shown are advertised box prices before shipping and tax
- Not all online cigar retailers are monitored; there may be lower prices at retailers not yet tracked
- Stock status reflects what the retailer's website reports and may not be real-time accurate
- This site does not sell cigars; it links to retailer product pages via affiliate links
